From fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import datetime
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

tasks = []

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str] = Field(None, example="Task description")
    status: str = Field('pending', example="pending")
    created_at: str

@app.post("/tasks", response_model=Task)
def create_task(task: Task):
    new_task = {
        "id": len(tasks) + 1,
        "title": task.title,
        "description": task.description,
        "status": task.status,
        "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
    }
    tasks.append(new_task)
    return new_task

@app.get("/tasks", response_model={"items": List[Task], "total": int, "page": int, "page_size": int})
def get_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    query_results = tasks
    if status:
        query_results = [task for task in tasks if task["status"] == status]
    start_index = (page - 1) * page_size
    end_index = start_index + page_size
    total = len(query_results)
    paginated_tasks = query_results[start_index:end_index]
    return {"items": paginated_tasks, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
def update_task_status(task_id: int, task_status: Task):
    task = next((t for t in tasks if t["id"] == task_id), None)
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404)
    task.update(task_status.dict())
    return task

From fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from datetime import datetime
from uuid import uuid4

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

tasks = []

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(default_factory=uuid4, init=False)
    title: str
    description: Optional[str] = None
    status: str = 'pending'
    created_at: str = Field(default_factory=datetime.isoformat, init=False)

    class Config:
        orm_mode = True

@app.post("/tasks/", response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
    task.created_at = datetime.isoformat(task.created_at)
    tasks.append(task)
    return task

@app.get("/tasks/", response_model={"items": List[Task], "total": int, "page": int, "page_size": int})
async def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    tasks_filtered = tasks
    if status:
        tasks_filtered = [task for task in tasks if task.status == status]

    total = len(tasks_filtered)
    start_index = (page - 1) * page_size
    end_index = start_index + page_size
    items = tasks_filtered[start_index:end_index]

    return {"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status/", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: str):
    task = next((t for t in tasks if t.id == task_id), None)
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")

    task.status = status
    return task

From fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import datetime
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from fastapi.params import Depends
from fastapi.routing import APIRouter

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

tasks = []

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str] = Field(None, max_length=200)
    status: str = "pending"
    created_at: str

router = APIRouter()

@router.post("/tasks", response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
    task.id = len(tasks) + 1
    task.created_at = datetime.now().isoformat()
    tasks.append(task)
    return task

@router.get("/tasks", response_model=TaskList)
async def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    filtered_tasks = tasks if not status else [task for task in tasks if task.status == status]
    start_index = (page - 1) * page_size
    end_index = start_index + page_size
    items = filtered_tasks[start_index:end_index]
    total = len(filtered_tasks)
    return TaskList(items=items, total=total, page=page, page_size=page_size)

@router.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: str):
    task = next((task for task in tasks if task.id == task_id), None)
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
    task.status = status
    return task

class TaskList(BaseModel):
    items: List[Task]
    total: int
    page: int
    page_size: int

app.include_router(router)

From fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import datetime
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

tasks = []

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str] = Field(None, example="Task description")
    status: str = Field('pending', example="pending")
    created_at: str

@app.post("/tasks/", response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
    task_id = len(tasks) + 1
    task = task.copy(update={'id': task_id, 'created_at': datetime.now().isoformat()})
    tasks.append(task)
    return task

def filter_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10) -> List[Task]:
    filtered_tasks = tasks
    if status:
        filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if task.status == status]

    start_index = (page - 1) * page_size
    end_index = start_index + page_size

    return filtered_tasks[start_index:end_index]

@app.get("/tasks/", response_model={"items": List[Task], "total": int, "page": int, "page_size": int})
async def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
    items = filter_tasks(status, page, page_size)
    total = len(filter_tasks(status))
    return {"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

def find_task(task_id: int) -> Optional[Task]:
    return next((task for task in tasks if task.id == task_id), None)

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: Task.status):
    task = find_task(task_id)
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
    task.status = status
    return task

From fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import datetime
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
app = FastAPI()

origins = [
"*",
]

app.add_middleware(
CORSMiddleware,
allow_origins=origins,
allow_credentials=True,
allow_methods=["*"],
allow_headers=["*"],
)

tasks = []

class Task(BaseModel):
id: Optional[int] = Field(default_factory=lambda: len(tasks) + 1)
title: str
description: Optional[str] = None
status: str = 'pending'
created_at: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now().isoformat())

@app.post("/tasks/", response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
global tasks
tasks.append(task.dict())
return task

@app.get("/tasks/", response_model={"items": List[Task], "total": int, "page": int, "page_size": int})
async def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
tasks_data = tasks
if status:
tasks_data = [task for task in tasks_data if task["status"] == status]
total = len(tasks_data)
tasks_data = tasks_data[(page - 1) * page_size:page * page_size]
return {"items": tasks_data, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status/", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: str):
task_index = -1
for i, task in enumerate(tasks):
if task["id"] == task_id:
task_index = i
break
if task_index == -1:
raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
tasks[task_index]["status"] = status
return tasks[task_index]

From fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import datetime
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=origins,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

tasks = []

class Task(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: Optional[str] = Field(None, alias="description")
    status: str = Field('pending', alias="status")
    created_at: str = Field(default_factory=datetime.isoformat, alias="created_at")

    class Config:
        orm_mode = True

@app.post("/tasks/", response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
    task.id = len(tasks) + 1
    tasks.append(task)
    return task

@app.get("/tasks/", response_model={"items": List[Task], "total": int, "page": int, "page_size": int})
async def read_tasks(page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10, status: Optional[str] = None):
    filtered_tasks = tasks if status is None else [task for task in tasks if task.status == status]
    start_index = (page - 1) * page_size
    end_index = start_index + page_size
    items = filtered_tasks[start_index:end_index]
    total = len(filtered_tasks)
    return {"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "page_size": page_size}

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status/", response_model=Optional[Task])
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: str):
    task = next((t for t in tasks if t.id == task_id), None)
    if task is None:
        return None
    task.status = status
    return task

From fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import datetime
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
app = FastAPI()

origins = [
"*",
]

app.add_middleware(
CORSMiddleware,
allow_origins=origins,
allow_credentials=True,
allow_methods=["*"],
allow_headers=["*"],
)

tasks = []

class Task(BaseModel):
id: int
title: str
description: Optional[str] = Field(None, title="The task's description")
status: str = "pending"
created_at: str

@app.post("/tasks/", response_model=Task)
async def create_task(task: Task):
global tasks
task_dict = task.dict()
task_dict["id"] = len(tasks) + 1
task_dict["created_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
tasks.append(task_dict)
return task_dict

def filter_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10) -> List[Task]:
filtered_tasks = [task for task in tasks if not status or task["status"] == status]
start_index = (page - 1) * page_size
end_index = start_index + page_size
return filtered_tasks[start_index:end_index]

@app.get("/tasks/", response_model={"items": List[Task], "total": int, "page": int, "page_size": int})
async def read_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page_size: int = 10):
 items = filter_tasks(status, page, page_size)
 return {
 "items": [Task(**task) for task in items],
 "total": len(tasks),
 "page": page,
 "page_size": page_size,
 }

@app.patch("/tasks/{task_id}/status", response_model=Task)
async def update_task_status(task_id: int, status: str):
task = next((t for t in tasks if t["id"] == task_id), None)
if not task:
raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
task["status"] = status
return Task(**task)
